name: screenvault
description: Record your screen and share instantly

scripts.build: npm run clean && mkdir -p dist/popup dist/ui/player && cp src/offscreen/offscreen.html dist/ && cp src/ui/popup/popup.html dist/popup/ && cp src/ui/popup/popup.css dist/popup/ && cp src/content/content.css dist/ && cp src/ui/player/player.html dist/ui/player/ && esbuild src/background/service-worker.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/service-worker.js --format=esm && esbuild src/offscreen/offscreen.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/offscreen.js --format=esm && esbuild src/ui/popup/popup.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/popup/popup.js --format=esm && esbuild src/content/content.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/content.js --format=esm && esbuild src/ui/player/player.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/ui/player/player.js --format=esm
scripts.watch: npm run build && concurrently "esbuild src/background/service-worker.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/service-worker.js --format=esm --watch" "esbuild src/offscreen/offscreen.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/offscreen.js --format=esm --watch" "esbuild src/ui/popup/popup.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/popup/popup.js --format=esm --watch" "esbuild src/content/content.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/content.js --format=esm --watch" "esbuild src/ui/player/player.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/ui/player/player.js --format=esm --watch"
